en: The king's heart is a stream of water in the hand of the LORD; he turns it wherever he will.
zh: 君王的心在耶和華手中，好像水溝的水， 他可以隨意轉移。

en: Every way of a man is right in his own eyes, but the LORD weighs the heart.
zh: 人看自己一切所行的，都是正直的； 耶和華卻衡量人心。

en: To do righteousness and justice is more acceptable to the LORD than sacrifice.
zh: 秉公行義， 比獻祭更蒙耶和華悅納。

en: Haughty eyes and a proud heart, the lamp of the wicked, are sin.
zh: 高傲的眼、傲慢的心， 惡人的燈，都是罪惡。

en: The plans of the diligent lead surely to abundance, but everyone who is hasty comes only to poverty.
zh: 殷勤人的籌劃必使他獲利； 行事急躁的必致貧窮。

en: The getting of treasures by a lying tongue is a fleeting vapor and a snare of death.
zh: 憑撒謊的舌頭得來的財寶， 是飄蕩的浮雲、死亡的追尋。

en: The violence of the wicked will sweep them away, because they refuse to do what is just.
zh: 惡人的暴行必拖累自己； 因為他們不肯秉行公正。

en: The way of the guilty is crooked, but the conduct of the pure is upright.
zh: 罪人的道路充滿狡詐， 清潔的人，行為正直。

en: It is better to live in a corner of the housetop than in a house shared with a quarrelsome wife.
zh: 寧可住在房頂的一角， 也不跟吵鬧的婦人同住一間房屋。

en: The soul of the wicked desires evil; his neighbor finds no mercy in his eyes.
zh: 惡人的心只求邪惡， 他的眼並不顧惜鄰舍。

en: When a scoffer is punished, the simple becomes wise; when a wise man is instructed, he gains knowledge.
zh: 好譏笑人的受刑罰的時候，愚蒙人就得著智慧； 智慧人受訓誨的時候，他就得著知識。

en: The Righteous One observes the house of the wicked; he throws the wicked down to ruin.
zh: 公義的 神留意惡人的家， 使惡人在禍患中毀滅。

en: Whoever closes his ear to the cry of the poor will himself call out and not be answered.
zh: 塞耳不聽貧窮人呼求的， 他將來呼求，也得不到應允。

en: A gift in secret averts anger, and a concealed bribe, strong wrath.
zh: 暗中送的禮物，可以平息怒氣， 懷裡藏的賄賂，能平息暴怒。

en: When justice is done, it is a joy to the righteous but terror to evildoers.
zh: 秉行公正，使義人喜樂， 卻使作孽的人恐懼。

en: One who wanders from the way of good sense will rest in the assembly of the dead.
zh: 偏離明慧之道的人， 必住在陰魂的會中。

en: Whoever loves pleasure will be a poor man; he who loves wine and oil will not be rich.
zh: 貪愛享樂的，必成為窮乏人； 好酒愛脂油的，必不會富足。

en: The wicked is a ransom for the righteous, and the traitor for the upright.
zh: 惡人作了義人的贖價， 奸詐人作了正直人的替身。

en: It is better to live in a desert land than with a quarrelsome and fretful woman.
zh: 寧可住在野地， 也不跟吵鬧易怒的婦人同住。

en: Precious treasure and oil are in a wise man's dwelling, but a foolish man devours it.
zh: 智慧人的居所中，積存珍貴的財物和油； 愚昧人卻把他所有的揮霍耗盡。

en: Whoever pursues righteousness and kindness will find life, righteousness, and honor.
zh: 追求公義與慈愛的， 必得著生命、公義和榮耀。

en: A wise man scales the city of the mighty and brings down the stronghold in which they trust.
zh: 智慧人登上勇士的城， 傾覆他倚靠的堅壘。

en: Whoever keeps his mouth and his tongue keeps himself out of trouble.
zh: 謹守口舌的， 保護自己免受患難。

en: "Scoffer" is the name of the arrogant, haughty man who acts with arrogant pride.
zh: 驕傲自大的人，他的名字是好譏笑人的； 他行事狂妄驕傲。

en: The desire of the sluggard kills him, for his hands refuse to labor.
zh: 懶惰人的願望害死自己， 因為他的手不肯工作。

en: All day long he craves and craves, but the righteous gives and does not hold back.
zh: 他終日貪得無厭， 但義人施予毫不吝嗇。

en: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination; how much more when he brings it with evil intent.
zh: 惡人的祭物是耶和華所厭惡的， 更何況是懷著惡念來獻的呢？

en: A false witness will perish, but the word of a man who hears will endure.
zh: 作假見證的必要滅亡， 聆聽真情的人，他的話長存。

en: A wicked man puts on a bold face, but the upright gives thought to his ways.
zh: 惡人厚顏無恥， 正直人卻堅定他的道路。

en: No wisdom, no understanding, no counsel can avail against the LORD.
zh: 任何智慧、聰明、 謀略都不能敵擋耶和華。

en: The horse is made ready for the day of battle, but the victory belongs to the LORD.
zh: 馬是為打仗之日預備的， 勝利卻在於耶和華。
